name: Suite 4 — Analytics (Period-comparison / Window / CTE / Recursive)
description: Canonical shapes 9 (period comparison via UNION ALL or CASE) and 10 (window functions, CTEs including recursive). Period cases mostly hit the verified-query catalog; window and recursive cases exercise the LlmDirectSqlEmitter escape valve via the QuestionShapeClassifier.

Scenarios.Question: tickets created today vs yesterday
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Today, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(DAY,-1,GETDATE()) AS DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Yesterday FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets this week vs last week
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisWeek, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt < DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastWeek FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: this month vs last month ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1)) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: year over year resolved tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: last 7 days vs previous 7 days ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Last7Days, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt < DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Previous7Days FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: rank entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name

Scenarios.Question: row number for tickets ordered by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CreatedAt) AS RowNum, TicketNumber, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: month over month ticket creation change using lag
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, MonthCount, LAG(MonthCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS PrevMonth, MonthCount - LAG(MonthCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS Change FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS MonthCount FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m

Scenarios.Question: median resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS MedianResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 7 day rolling average of tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, AVG(CAST(DayCount AS FLOAT)) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Rolling7DayAvg FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS DayCount FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-60,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: using a cte get the daily ticket counts for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH DailyCounts AS (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) SELECT Day, Count FROM DailyCounts ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: with a cte compute average resolution time per priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH ResolutionByPriority AS (SELECT p.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name) SELECT Priority, AvgDays FROM ResolutionByPriority ORDER BY AvgDays DESC

Scenarios.Question: with two ctes compute monthly counts then filter only months above 30 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH MonthlyCounts AS (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')), BusyMonths AS (SELECT Month, Count FROM MonthlyCounts WHERE Count > 30) SELECT Month, Count FROM BusyMonths ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: using a cte rank tickets within each priority by created date and keep the first 2 per priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH RankedTickets AS (SELECT t.TicketNumber, p.Name AS Priority, t.CreatedAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.PriorityId ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC) AS rn FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0) SELECT TicketNumber, Priority, CreatedAt FROM RankedTickets WHERE rn <= 2 ORDER BY Priority, CreatedAt

Scenarios.Question: show all child tickets of any ticket that has children
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH TicketTree AS (SELECT Id, TicketNumber, Title, ParentTicketId, 0 AS Depth FROM Tickets WHERE ParentTicketId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.ParentTicketId, tt.Depth + 1 FROM Tickets t INNER JOIN TicketTree tt ON t.ParentTicketId = tt.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0) SELECT TicketNumber, Title, Depth FROM TicketTree WHERE Depth > 0 ORDER BY Depth, TicketNumber
Scenarios._note: Recursive CTE on Tickets.ParentTicketId self-FK. Tests the hierarchy-walk pattern. Curated VQ entries cover this shape.
